lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have time for idle chit-chat, I need to send a fairy to get little Freddies tooth!

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have time to talk, I need to send a Tooth Fairy to visit Sarah-Jane!

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have time for idle chit-chat, I need to find a Winter Fairy to send to Trollheim!

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have time to stop, I need to send a Weather Fairy off to Etceteria!

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have time for idle chit-chat, I need to send an Autumn Fairy off to Burthorpe!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Gatekeeper
lines.text: They look familiar, but I can't think where I've seen marks like that. Try asking around, maybe somebody else will recognise them.
